story.sectionSubtitle: Every step of our journey has been filled with love

nodes.title: First Encounter
nodes.description: On a sunny afternoon, we met by chance in the university library. A dropped book, a warm smile, and fate changed forever.

nodes.title: First Trip Together
nodes.description: We set off on our first journey together to Yunnan. Watching the sunset by Erhai Lake, we knew we had found the one.

nodes.title: The Proposal
nodes.description: Among the pristine snow of Hokkaido, a long-prepared surprise, a heartfelt 'Will you marry me?' — and she said yes, with tears of joy.

nodes.title: Forever Together
nodes.description: Surrounded by our loved ones, we will make our lifelong vows. Thank you to everyone who has been part of our happiness.
